title: Is there a way to automatically move an item in one group to a sub-item of an item in another group on my board, when a specific column matches exactly?
excerpt: I would like to know if there is an app that would look at a NEW item that gets created in one group, then see if the EMAIL column matches another EMAIL column exactly for an OLDER item that is in a different group on th…

posts.author: dwadsworth (Dustin Wadsworth)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like to know if there is an app that would look at a NEW item that gets created in one group, then see if the EMAIL column matches another EMAIL column exactly for an OLDER item that is in a different group on the same board, then convert it to a sub-item for the OLDER item.

posts.author: JHconsultancy (Joseph Honig)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

You can do this in Make.com, If you need help with setting it up feel free to DM me.
